label: Gentle pause
template: I care about this, and I need a little time to think before I answer.

label: Clear pause
template: I am not ready to decide right now. I need time to think clearly.

label: Firm boundary
template: I am not comfortable making this decision under pressure. I will respond when I feel clear.

label: Evidence request
template: I am open to understanding this better. Can you show me the evidence without needing me to agree right away?

label: Care with boundary
template: I care about you, and I still need my choice to be respected.

label: Exit line
template: This conversation does not feel healthy right now. I am going to step away and come back when things are calmer.
